_readme: MCP server catalog for spark-sovereign. Copy any block into the mcpServers section of config/openclaw.json to enable it. All ${ENV_VAR} placeholders are substituted from .env by scripts/07_nemoclaw.sh. Enable only what you need — each server spawns a subprocess.

filesystem._description: Read, write, search, and move files on the Spark. Essential for any file-manipulation task.

git._description: Full git operations — commit, branch, diff, log, blame, stash. Works on any local repo.

github._description: GitHub API — create/review PRs, open issues, push commits, manage releases, search code.

aider._description: Trigger aider coding sessions from within an agent. Agent writes the prompt, aider applies code changes.

puppeteer._description: Full browser control — navigate URLs, click, fill forms, take screenshots, scrape pages. Required for any web automation.

fetch._description: Make HTTP requests to any API or URL. GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with custom headers. Lighter than puppeteer for pure API calls.

searxng._description: Web search via local SearXNG — private, no API key. Feeds results into pgvector RAG cache.

shell._description: Execute bash commands on the Spark. Use for any system operation the agent needs to perform autonomously.
shell._warning: Powerful — restrict allowed_commands in production if needed.

docker._description: Manage Docker containers — start/stop/inspect containers, pull images, view logs.

postgres._description: Direct SQL queries to pgvector / agent_memory DB. Useful for agent introspection of its own memory.

aws._description: AWS operations — S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch, DynamoDB, SQS, IAM. Uses local AWS profile.

stripe._description: Stripe API — customers, subscriptions, invoices, webhooks, refunds, disputes.

slack._description: Read channels, send messages, search Slack. Distinct from the NemoClaw Slack channel (which receives commands). This lets the agent proactively post.

notion._description: Read and write Notion pages and databases — notes, project docs, wikis.

linear._description: Linear issue tracker — create/update issues, manage sprints, query projects.

gmail._description: Read and send email via Gmail. Agent can draft and send on your behalf.

google-calendar._description: Read calendar, create events, check availability, schedule meetings.

_active_profile_note: The profiles below are pre-selected subsets. Copy the relevant servers into openclaw.json mcpServers.
